taskId.description: Unique task identifier for polling and result retrieval

kind.description: Type of work: 'cad' (single operation), 'model' (parametric model), 'convert-simple'/'convert-advanced' (file conversion), 'pipeline' (sequential chain), 'compound' (parallel batch), 'tenant' (tenant-scoped)
kind.title: TaskKind

status.description: Task lifecycle state: waiting (pending dependencies), queued (in queue), processing (actively computing), completed (result available), failed (error occurred), cancelled (user-cancelled), expired (result TTL exceeded)
status.title: TaskStatus

progress.description: Completion percentage (0–100) or null if progress is not tracked for this task kind

error.description: Error message when status is 'failed'. Null for all other statuses.

mime.description: MIME type of the result file (e.g. 'model/gltf-binary', 'application/step')

bytes.description: Size of the result file in bytes

additionalProperties.description: Metadata about a single downloadable result part
additionalProperties.title: ResultPartMeta

resultParts.description: Available result files keyed by format (e.g. 'glb', 'step'). Null until task completes.

metadata.description: Additional task metadata (e.g. resolved parameters, model name). Shape varies by task kind.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task was created

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when processing began. Null if still queued.

finishedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task completed (success or failure). Null if still running.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when task results will be automatically deleted

items.description: Complete task status including lifecycle timestamps, progress, and result metadata
items.title: TaskDetail

data.description: Paginated list of tasks with total count
data.title: TaskList

schema.description: Success envelope containing a paginated task list
schema.title: TaskListResponse
